transcript.user: I'd like to cancel my RallyTV subscription
transcript.bot: To help with your cancellation request, could you please confirm if you are signed in to your DAZN account? If not, please sign in here: DAZN | Sign in Once you're signed in, please reply "I'm signed in" and I'll continue.

result.cancellationOptionMessage: Your subscription will be cancelled after a 30-day notice period.

transcript.bot: I'm sorry to hear you'd like to cancel your RallyTV Monthly plan. Could you share the reason for your cancellation? Your feedback helps us improve your experience.

result.cancellationOptionMessage: Your subscription will be cancelled after a 30-day notice period.

transcript.bot:
If I cancel your subscription today, your 30-day notice period will begin. During this time, you can still enjoy full access to DAZN content without any interruptions.

If applicable, you will make a final prorated payment on your scheduled billing date, 2026-06-01. This payment will be lower than your usual monthly charge, as it covers the remaining days of the notice period.

Would you like me to go ahead and cancel now?

result.message: The request has been successfully submitted for processing

transcript.bot:
Your subscription has been cancelled — auto-renewal is now off. You'll retain access until 2026-07-01. A final prorated payment covering the period up to that date will be charged on 2026-06-01.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?

results.criterion: Pause offer is NOT presented for RallyTV subscription
results.reason: No pause offer is mentioned or presented in any bot message.

results.criterion: Flow goes from retention offer check directly to cancellation impact (Step 7) without pause step
results.reason: After checking for retention offers, the bot immediately explains the cancellation impact without mentioning or offering a pause.

results.criterion: Cancellation impact message (30-day notice) is shown with nextChargeDate
results.reason: The bot clearly states the 30-day notice and provides the nextChargeDate (2026-06-01) in the cancellation impact message.

results.criterion: cancelProduct is called after user confirms
results.reason: The user confirms cancellation in Turn 4, and cancelProduct is called immediately after.

evaluation.summary: All criteria are fully satisfied; the bot handled the RallyTV cancellation flow correctly without offering a pause and provided the required cancellation impact details.
